---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_raw/
    methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
    outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/DMPK_Methylation/
    mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_dir)
```


## Select ISA file to get correct sample IDs
```{r}
isa_assay_prot <- readxl::read_xlsx('C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx', sheet = 'Assay - proteomics')
```

```{r}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')

phenotype_data <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```

```{r}
feature_metadata <- elementMetadata(meth_subset)
feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(feature_metadata)
rownames(feature_metadata) <- paste0(feature_metadata$chr, '_', feature_metadata$start)
  
## Measurement data
beta_values_df <- assays(meth_subset)[[1]]

DMR_list <- read.csv('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/DMRS_DM1_c2.csv', row.names = 1)

## GRanges objects
regions_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = DMR_list$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = DMR_list$start, end = DMR_list$end)
)

coords_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = feature_metadata$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = feature_metadata$start, end = feature_metadata$start)
)

overlaps <- findOverlaps(coords_gr, regions_gr)

result <- data.frame(
  coord_idx = queryHits(overlaps),
  region_idx = subjectHits(overlaps),
  chr = as.character(seqnames(coords_gr[queryHits(overlaps)])),
  pos = start(coords_gr[queryHits(overlaps)]),
  region_start = start(regions_gr[subjectHits(overlaps)]),
  region_end = end(regions_gr[subjectHits(overlaps)])
)

feature_metadata$coord_idx <- 1:nrow(feature_metadata)
result <- merge(result, feature_metadata, by='coord_idx')
```




## Select TMEM132 region
```{r}
meth_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr12', start = 128266420, end =129904700))
```
```{r}
read_meth2df <- function(meth, isa_assay) {
  
  ## Feature metadata
  feature_metadata <- elementMetadata(meth)
  feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(feature_metadata)
  rownames(feature_metadata) <- paste0(feature_metadata$chr, '_', feature_metadata$start)
  
  ## Measurement data
  beta_values_df <- assays(meth)[[1]]
  
  ## Feature names
  rownames(beta_values_df) <- rownames(feature_metadata)
  
  ## Re-format sample names
  new_samples_names <- gsub( "WI-3791-", "", colnames(beta_values_df))
  new_samples_names <- gsub( "Epigenomics", "Proteomics", new_samples_names)
  new_samples_names <- gsub( "_1_val_1_bismark_bt2_pe", "", new_samples_names)
  new_samples_names <- gsub( "-", "_", new_samples_names)
  
  ## Get universal names by mapping to ISA file
  isa_assay <- isa_assay[!duplicated(isa_assay$`assay identifier`),]
  universal_names_meth <- lapply(new_samples_names, function(x) {
    name_uni <- isa_assay[isa_assay$`assay identifier` == x, "sample identifier"]
    bio_rep <- isa_assay[isa_assay$`assay identifier` == x, "biological replicate"]
    name_uni <- paste0(name_uni, "_", bio_rep)
    name_uni
  })
  beta_values_df <- data.frame(beta_values_df)
  colnames(beta_values_df) <- as.character(universal_names_meth)
  colnames(beta_values_df) <- gsub( "-", "_", colnames(beta_values_df))
  colnames(beta_values_df) <- gsub( "409B", "X409B", colnames(beta_values_df))
  
  return(list(beta_values_df, feature_metadata)) 
}
```


## Combine with pheno df
```{r}
#source('support_functions/ReadMethrix2Df.R')
df_list <- read_meth2df(meth_subset, isa_assay_prot)
df <- data.frame(t(df_list[[1]]))

phenotype_data <- phenotype_data[rownames(df),]

df$Phenotype <- phenotype_data$phenotype
df$Sample <- phenotype_data$observation.unit.identifier.crispr
df$Clone <- phenotype_data$sample.description
```


## Only keep DM1 P2 clones 
```{r}
Sample_Subset <- c('DM_2', 'CTRL_Sendai', 'CTRL_WTC', 'CTRL_409B')

df <- df[df$Sample %in% Sample_Subset,]
df <- df[rownames(df) != 'NA',]
```


## Plot methylation in the DMPK region
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=4}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)


## Chromosome 12
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("chr12_"),
    names_to = "Genome_Location",
    values_to = "Measurement"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Genome_Location = as.numeric(gsub("chr12_", "", Genome_Location)))

df_avg_Sample <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Clone, Genome_Location) %>%
  summarize(Avr_Beta =  mean(Measurement), .groups= "drop")

## Save to compare with iPSC stage measurements
#write.csv(df_avg_Sample, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/Avg_Meth_TMEM132.csv')
```


## Heatmap
```{r}
library(pheatmap)
ggp <- pheatmap(
  df[,c(1:216)],
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_cols = F,
  show_colnames = F,
  show_rownames = T
)
ggp
```


## Plot function
```{r}
source('support_functions/plot_DMR.R')

ggp <- plot_DMR(df_avg_Sample, 128266425, 128268660, 'TMEM132C')
ggsave('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/Clones_TMEM132C.pdf', ggp, width=16, height =4)
```


## TMEM132D
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=4}
ggp <- plot_DMR(df_avg_Sample, 129902900, 129904700, 'TMEM132D') 

ggsave('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/Clones_TMEM132D.pdf', ggp, width=16, height =4)
```


## Heatmap
```{r}
library(pheatmap)
ggp <- pheatmap(
  df[,c(21162:21339)],
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_cols = F,
  show_colnames = F,
  show_rownames = T
)
ggp
```
